mysterious.example: A mysterious light appeared in the sky.
mysterious.example_zh: 天空中出現了一道神秘的光。

namely.example: Two students passed, namely Tom and Amy.
namely.example_zh: 有兩名學生通過了，也就是湯姆和艾咪。

needy.example: They gave food to needy families.
needy.example_zh: 他們把食物送給貧困的家庭。

neglect.example: The old house showed years of neglect.
neglect.example_zh: 那棟老房子顯露出多年的失修。

negotiate.example_zh: 他們談妥了一個公道的價格。

nevertheless.example: It was hard; nevertheless, she tried.

nightmare.example: She woke up from a bad nightmare.

noble.example: Helping the poor is a noble act.
noble.example_zh: 幫助窮人是高尚的行為。

noble.example: The nobles lived in grand houses.

nonsense.example: Stop talking nonsense and be serious.

nowadays.example_zh: 如今大多數人都用智慧型手機。

nuclear.example: The country built a nuclear power plant.
nuclear.example_zh: 這個國家建了一座核能發電廠。

numerous.example: She has numerous books at home.

nursery.example: Young plants grow in the nursery.
The baby sleeps in the nursery.

obedience.example: The dog was trained for obedience.

obedient.example: She is an obedient and polite child.
obedient.example_zh: 她是個聽話又有禮貌的孩子。

objection.example: He raised no objection to the plan.
objection.example_zh: 他對這個計畫沒有異議。

objective.example: Our main objective is to win.
objective.example_zh: 我們的主要目標是獲勝。

objective.example: Try to give an objective opinion.

observation.example: His careful observation led to a discovery.
observation.example_zh: 他細心的觀察帶來了一項發現。

obstacle.example: She overcame every obstacle in her path.
obstacle.example_zh: 她克服了路上的每一個障礙。

obtain.example: He obtained a ticket for the concert.
obtain.example_zh: 他取得了一張演唱會的票。

occasional.example: We take an occasional trip to the sea.

occupation.example: Please write your occupation on the form.
occupation.example_zh: 請在表格上填寫你的職業。

occupation.example: The occupation of the land lasted years.
occupation.example_zh: 對這塊土地的佔領持續了好幾年。

occupy.example: The big sofa occupies half the room.
occupy.example_zh: 那張大沙發佔了房間的一半。

offend.example: I'm sorry if my words offended you.
offend.example_zh: 如果我的話冒犯了你，我很抱歉。

offense.example: Driving too fast is a traffic offense.

offensive.example: His offensive remark made her angry.
The team played an offensive game.
offensive.example_zh: 這隊打的是進攻型的比賽。

opera.example: We watched a famous opera last night.
opera.example_zh: 我們昨晚看了一齣著名的歌劇。

oppose.example: Many people opposed the new plan.
oppose.example_zh: 許多人反對這項新計畫。

option.example: You have two options to choose from.

orbit.example: The moon moves in orbit around the earth.
orbit.example_zh: 月球沿著軌道繞地球運行。

orchestra.example: The orchestra played a lovely song.
orchestra.example_zh: 管弦樂團演奏了一首動聽的曲子。

orientation.example: New students attend an orientation day.

orientation.example_zh: 這張地圖有助於辨明方向。

orphan.example: The kind family adopted an orphan.
orphan.example_zh: 那個善良的家庭收養了一個孤兒。
戰爭使許多孩子成為孤兒。

otherwise.example: Hurry up; otherwise, we'll be late.

outcome.example: We were happy with the outcome of the game.
outcome.example_zh: 我們對比賽的結果很滿意。

oval.example: The mirror has an oval shape.
Draw an oval on the paper.

overcoat.example: He wore a heavy overcoat in winter.
overcoat.example_zh: 他冬天穿著厚重的大衣。

overcome.example: She overcame her fear of swimming.
overcome.example_zh: 她克服了對游泳的恐懼。

overlook.example_zh: 我們的房間可以俯瞰大海。

overnight.example: We stayed overnight at a hotel.
The song was an overnight success.

overthrow.example: The people tried to overthrow the king.

oxygen.example: Plants give us oxygen to breathe.
oxygen.example_zh: 植物提供我們呼吸所需的氧氣。

pace.example: He walked at a slow pace.

panel.example: She pressed a button on the control panel.
panel.example_zh: 她按下控制面板上的一個按鈕。

panel.example: A panel of judges chose the winner.
panel.example_zh: 一組評審選出了優勝者。

parachute.example: He jumped from the plane with a parachute.
parachute.example_zh: 他背著降落傘從飛機上跳下。

paragraph.example: Each paragraph has one main idea.

partial.example: We got a partial refund for the ticket.
partial.example_zh: 我們的票得到了部分退款。

partial.example: A judge should not be partial.

participation.example: Your participation in class is important.
participation.example_zh: 你在課堂上的參與很重要。

partnership.example: The two companies formed a partnership.
partnership.example_zh: 這兩家公司結成了合作夥伴。

passive.example: He took a passive role in the group.
passive.example_zh: 他在團體中扮演被動的角色。

pasta.example: We had pasta with tomato sauce.
pasta.example_zh: 我們吃了番茄醬義大利麵。

paw.example: The cat hurt its front paw.

peculiar.example: The soup had a peculiar taste.

peep.example: He took a peep at the answer.

peer.example: Teens often listen to their peers.
She peered into the dark room.
peer.example_zh: 她盯著那間黑暗的房間看。

penalty.example: The penalty for cheating is severe.
